div.h1: Dense Array Iteration: Cache Line Utilization

g.text: Dense Array: Vec<Position> (800 KB for 100K entities)

ul.li: 100,000 entities × 8 bytes = 800 KB (fits in L3 cache)
Cache lines needed: 800 KB ÷ 64 bytes = 12,500 lines
After warmup: all data hits L1/L3
Per entity: 1 L1 cache hit (~4 cycles)
Each entity access: random memory location
Per entity: 1 L3 cache miss (~100 cycles) + memory overhead

g.text: Hardware Prefetcher | loads cache lines ahead
